modelDescription: State-sponsored APT targeting regional power utilities...

nodes.name: Initial Access
nodes.description: Probability of gaining initial access to target systems

nodes.name: Number of Actors
nodes.description: Estimated number of threat actors with sufficient capability and motivation to attempt this type of attack within a given year. This estimate accounts for the specific operational category, target sector attractiveness, and required technical sophistication. Higher values indicate a more broadly attempted attack vector with lower barriers to entry.

nodes.name: Number of Attempts per Actor
nodes.description: Average attack attempts per actor per year

nodes.name: Total Risk
nodes.description: Expected annual loss from this threat scenario

nodes.name: Phishing
nodes.description: Spear-phishing campaigns targeting utility employees with access to SCADA systems. Includes email, SMS, and social engineering variants tailored to the energy sector.

nodes.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
nodes.description: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in internet-facing services such as VPNs, web portals, and remote access gateways commonly used by utility companies.

nodes.name: OS Credential Dumping
nodes.description: Extraction of credentials from operating system memory, registry, or credential stores to obtain higher-privilege access tokens.

nodes.name: Access Token Manipulation
nodes.description: Manipulation of access tokens to operate under a different user or system security context, bypassing access controls.
